name: Remove-Variable

options.name: -Exclude
options.description: Specifies an array of items that this cmdlet omits from the operation. The value of this parameter qualifies the Name parameter. Enter a name element or pattern, such as "s*". Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Indicates that the cmdlet removes a variable even if it is read-only. Even using the Force parameter, the cmdlet cannot remove a constant.

options.name: -Include
options.description: Specifies an array of items that this cmdlet deletes in the operation. The value of this parameter qualifies the Name parameter. Enter a name element or pattern, such as s*. Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the name of the variable to be removed. The parameter name ( Name ) is optional. Wildcards are permitted

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Gets only the variables in the specified scope. The acceptable values for this parameter are:

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

args.name: -Name
args.description: Specifies the name of the variable to be removed. The parameter name ( Name ) is optional. Wildcards are permitted

description: Deletes a variable and its value.
